_schema: LJM Machine & Tooling Registry v1 — copy this file to machines.json (gitignored) and fill in real values. machines.json is never committed.

local.elevation_note: UAC prompt available but Claude cannot trigger it — request user to elevate manually if an install requires admin.
local.notes: Primary day-to-day machine. Set current: true on whichever machine this config lives on.

remote-linux.elevation_note: User-only. No sudo for Claude sessions. Request user to elevate manually if install requires root.

ssh.notes: CRITICAL: Git Bash SSH may have libcrypto incompatibility with certain key types — always prefer Windows native ssh.exe.

remote-linux.notes: Replace with machine purpose and typical use cases.

lab-full-access.elevation_note: Full root/sudo available. Claude can install and elevate freely.

ssh.notes: Replace port 22 with actual port if non-standard.

lab-full-access.notes: Isolated test environment, only online for testing. Lower data sensitivity.

wsl.elevation_note: User-only within WSL. No sudo for Claude sessions.
wsl.notes: Linux environment on the local machine. Distro: YOUR_DISTRO

unconfigured-example.notes: Entries with status: unconfigured are skipped in routing decisions.

example-binary.description: Example binary tool — replace with real tool

local.notes: Any quirks, aliases, or detection-evasion notes

example-mcp-server.description: Example MCP server — replace with real tool

local.notes: Available via Claude Code MCP integration (configured in .claude/)

remote-linux.notes: Headless install; SSH tunnel to connect
